summary.business_type: Local Service — independent real estate agent (mandataire IAD France), single-page lead-gen, service-area/personal brand
top_findings: Canonical, OG and Twitter URLs point to a dead domain (fannycarcelesapp.vercel.app, 404) instead of the live .fr domain
Sitemap and robots.txt reference the wrong/dead domain; live .fr URL absent from sitemap
Client-side-rendered SPA: body content not in initial HTML (invisible to AI crawlers)
Repo index.html is stale and would regress all live SEO on next build/deploy
Self-serving aggregateRating (4.9/70) with no individual Review objects and mismatched count
quick_wins: Fix sitemap.xml loc to the .fr domain
Fix robots.txt Sitemap directive and remove vercel.app references
Add favicon.ico (currently 404) and a dedicated 1200x630 OG image
Add Mentions legales + Politique de confidentialite pages (RGPD requirement + trust)

findings.title: Canonical points to dead domain
findings.description: <link rel=canonical> targets https://fannycarcelesapp.vercel.app which now returns 404.
findings.recommendation: Self-referencing canonical to https://fannycarceles-immobilier-allevard.fr/

findings.title: Sitemap & robots reference wrong domain
findings.description: sitemap.xml lists only vercel.app/ (404); robots.txt Sitemap directive points to vercel.app. Live .fr URL is in no sitemap.
findings.recommendation: Rewrite sitemap loc and robots Sitemap directive to the .fr domain.

findings.title: Client-side rendering
findings.description: Served HTML is a ~3.8KB shell with empty #root; no SSR/SSG/prerender.
findings.recommendation: Add prerendering/SSG for the homepage.

findings.title: Stale repo index.html
findings.description: Repo index.html has lang=en, generic title, no meta/OG/schema; a rebuild would regress production SEO.
findings.recommendation: Sync the production head into the repo.

findings.title: No favicon
findings.description: /favicon.ico returns 404.
findings.recommendation: Add favicon.ico + apple-touch-icon.

findings.title: Thin site footprint
findings.description: Single indexable page (~600 words); no blog, commune pages or FAQ.
findings.recommendation: Add commune landing pages and/or a small blog and an FAQ.

findings.title: Body content CSR-only
findings.description: Services/reviews/form invisible to non-JS crawlers.
findings.recommendation: Prerender content into static HTML.

findings.title: Missing legal pages
findings.description: No Mentions legales / Politique de confidentialite; form collects personal data (RGPD).
findings.recommendation: Add both pages; link in footer.

findings.title: Limited author credibility
findings.description: No SIRET/RSAC number or bio depth for a YMYL topic.
findings.recommendation: Add legal IDs and an about/bio section.

findings.title: H1 is brand name only
findings.description: Single H1 = logo name; hero value prop is an H2.
findings.recommendation: Promote a keyword-rich H1 (e.g. 'Conseillere immobiliere a Allevard - avis de valeur gratuit').

findings.title: Single ranking surface
findings.description: One URL = one keyword target, no internal linking depth.
findings.recommendation: Add content pages with internal links.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: Valid RealEstateAgent JSON-LD with areaServed, sameAs, telephone, email, image

findings.title: Self-serving aggregateRating
findings.description: ratingValue 4.9/reviewCount 70 with no Review objects and count not matching the 5 on-page reviews; rich-result ineligible and a policy risk.
findings.recommendation: Add individual Review objects matching on-page testimonials, or remove aggregateRating.

findings.title: Schema gaps
findings.description: Missing url, priceRange, description, WebSite, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage.
findings.recommendation: Enrich schema and add FAQPage.

findings.title: LCP risk from oversized hero
findings.description: Eager 2000px Unsplash hero likely LCP element.
findings.recommendation: Serve sized/compressed local image with fetchpriority=high.

findings.title: CLS risk
findings.description: No width/height on images; marquee/gradient animations.
findings.recommendation: Set explicit image dimensions; reserve space.

findings.title: Heavy JS bundle
findings.description: React 19 + router + Framer Motion + lucide in one bundle for a one-pager.
findings.recommendation: Code-split or replace Framer Motion with CSS animations.

findings.title: Body invisible to AI crawlers
findings.description: CSR means GPTBot/ClaudeBot/PerplexityBot see an empty body.
findings.recommendation: Prerender/SSG so answer-bearing content ships in HTML.

findings.title: No llms.txt / FAQ
findings.description: No llms.txt and no FAQPage content for AI answers.
findings.recommendation: Add a static FAQ + FAQPage schema and an llms.txt.

categories.name: Images
what_works: All images have descriptive alt text

findings.title: No image dimensions
findings.description: Missing width/height causes CLS.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit width/height.

findings.title: External oversized hosting
findings.description: Hero/profile served from Unsplash/iadfrance CDN, hero is 2000px.
findings.recommendation: Self-host sized, modern-format images.

findings.title: OG image is square profile photo
findings.description: summary_large_image expects 1200x630.
findings.recommendation: Create a dedicated social card.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Verify .fr in Search Console and submit sitemap

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Add Mentions legales + Politique de confidentialite
